name: Redpanda Streaming (Kafka)
description: An ultra-fast, lightweight Kafka-compatible streaming engine including the Redpanda Console GUI.

aws.parity: Redpanda is Kafka-API compatible, so producers/consumers and topics behave locally exactly as on MSK.
aws.deploy: Point your Kafka bootstrap servers at the MSK cluster endpoint (add the IAM/TLS auth config).

variables.label: Kafka API Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine for application code connections.

variables.label: Redpanda Console Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the visual streaming inspector dashboard.
